task: feat: servidor headless (HTTP/SSE) para integração com CI/CD e clientes externos (issue #49)

todos.title: Add Headless config fields (Enabled, Host, Port) to Config struct and TomlConfig — supports devon.toml [headless] section
Add --headless, --port, --host persistent flags to root cobra command and create headless subcommand skeleton
Create proto/devon.proto — reference gRPC service definition with DevonService, event types (text_delta, tool_start, tool_done, action_required, turn_done, error), and bidirectional streaming RPC
Create internal/headless/types.go — public API types: PromptRequest, EventResponse (type + payload), ActionRequiredRequest, RespondRequest, SSE event constants, reusable Event type aliases

Create internal/headless/server.go — HTTP server struct with Listen/Serve/Close, SSE connection manager (per-client event queue, graceful close), integrates with agent.ReplyCh for action_required blocking

Create internal/headless/handler.go — HTTP handlers: POST /api/prompt (accepts prompt → returns SSE stream), POST /api/respond (unblocks action_required), GET /api/health, GET /api/status. Maps agent.Event types to SSE events, handles confirm_request → action_required flow

Create internal/headless/server_test.go — tests with mock agent: SSE stream receives text_delta/tool_start/tool_done/turn_done, action_required blocks until /api/respond, health endpoint returns 200, concurrent clients

Implement runHeadless function in cmd/devon/main.go — init agent, create headless server, wire agent events to SSE stream, handle action_required via HTTP endpoint, serve until SIGINT. Wire into --headless flag and headless subcommand
Add [headless] sample config section to devon.toml — host, port, enabled fields with documentation comments
Verify build, lint, and tests pass — go build ./..., go test ./..., go vet ./..., golangci-lint run across all packages
